query:
SELECT 'paperPositions' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM paperPositions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'paperTrades', COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades
UNION ALL
SELECT 'paperEquitySnapshots', COUNT(*) FROM paperEquitySnapshots
UNION ALL
SELECT 'paperLedger_cash', availableCash FROM paperLedger WHERE userId = 1;
